name: Braised Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a skillet until foamy.
2. Add chives and saute until tender.
3. Add green cabbage and carrots.
4. Saute over high heat until tender but crisp, about 4 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. If you don't have scallions, onions are the next best substitute.
